## Top 3 Outcomes

Scoring rubric: Due today/overdue +3 · calendar event today matches a title keyword +2 · non-Aaron assignee (blocks someone) +2 · stale 7+ days +1. **Caveat:** the Notion Master Tasks reachable via semantic search have no Due dates set, so the +3 lever almost never fires and raw scores are low. 2. **[Nestmate] Work the AFC/Richard post-meeting task bundle (5 open items).** — score **0** on the strict rubric (no Due dates set), surfaced via the business-rotation tiebreak so Nestmate isn't shut out. 3. **[United IPA] Kader follow-ups — Dr. Bassak, Saboor Waizon, Shaikh Hassan, VSVL Physicians PC.** — score **2** (blocks someone else +2: each line is "Kader needs to speak with"). Status "In progress", edited today; tagged [BACK-BURNER] but it's the next-highest scored actionable Notion item.
